controls.control_objective: To ensure be called non-banking financial company returns (reserve bank) directions, 2016
controls.control_description:
a) These Directions shall be called Non-Banking Financial Company Returns
(Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called non-banking financial company returns (reserve bank) directions, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: b) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a reporting system for filing various returns within the prescribed timeframe
controls.control_description: All the NBFCs shall put in place a reporting system for filing various returns within the prescribed timeframe.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a reporting system for filing various returns within the prescribed timeframe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be delayed for any reason such as the finalization/completion of the audit of the annual accounts
controls.control_description: Submission of return should not be delayed for any reason such as the finalization/completion of the Audit of the annual accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be delayed for any reason such as the finalization/completion of the audit of the annual accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the basis of the figures available in the books of account of the company
controls.control_description: The compilation of the Return should be on the basis of the figures available in the books of account of the company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the basis of the figures available in the books of account of the company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be filed on-line by an authorised official of the nbfc, who will be specifically authorised in this regard by the board of directors
controls.control_description: The returns shall be filed on-line by an authorised official of the NBFC, who will be specifically authorised in this regard by the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be filed on-line by an authorised official of the nbfc, who will be specifically authorised in this regard by the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to the timeframe fixed in this direction for submitting returns to the bank failing which concerned nbfcs would be liable for penal ac
controls.control_description: The NBFCs shall strictly adhere to the timeframe fixed in this direction for submitting returns to the Bank failing which concerned NBFCs would be liable for penal action as prescribed under the provisions of Chapter V of the RBI Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly adhere to the timeframe fixed in this direction for submitting returns to the bank failing which concerned nbfcs would be liable for penal ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carefully noted that in case the information/particulars furnished by a nbfcs is found incorrect, reserve bank of india would take a serious view i
controls.control_description: It may be carefully noted that in case the information/particulars furnished by a NBFCs is found incorrect, Reserve Bank of India would take a serious view in the matter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carefully noted that in case the information/particulars furnished by a nbfcs is found incorrect, reserve bank of india would take a serious view i

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit various returns to the bank w
controls.control_description:
Chapter - III Returns to be submitted by NBFCs

The Non Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs) are required to submit various returns to the Bank w.r.t their deposit acceptance, prudential norms compliance, ALM etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit various returns to the bank w

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit nbs-1 return on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
NBS-1 Return (on Financial Indicators by deposit taking NBFCs):
With reference to Master Direction - Non Banking Financial Company - Systemically Important - Non Deposit taking and Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank)
Direction 2016, all NBFCs accepting/holding public deposits are required to submit NBS-1 return on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit nbs-1 return on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit nbs-2 return on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
NBS-2 Return (on Prudential Norms by deposit taking NBFCs):

With reference to Master Direction - Non Banking Financial Company - Systemically Important Non Deposit taking and Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Direction 2016, all NBFCs accepting/holding public deposits are required to submit NBS-2 return on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit nbs-2 return on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit nbs-3 return on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
NBS-3 Return (on Liquid Assets by deposit taking NBFCs):

With reference to the provisions of section 45IB (2) of the RBI Act, all NBFCs accepting/holding public deposits are required to submit NBS-3 return on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit nbs-3 return on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be half-yearly
controls.control_description: The periodicity of the Asset-Liability Management Return shall be half-yearly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be half-yearly

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit ndsi 500cr return on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
NDSI_500cr return (on Important Financial Parameters):

With reference to Master Direction - Non Banking Financial Company - Systemically Important Non Deposit taking and Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Direction 2016, all NBFCs-ND-SI are required to submit NDSI 500cr return on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit ndsi 500cr return on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit nbs-7 return on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
NBS-7 (on Prudential Norms by NBFCs-ND-SI):

With reference to Master Direction - Non Banking Financial Company - Systemically Important Non Deposit taking and Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Direction 2016, all NBFCs-ND-SI are required to submit NBS-7 return on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit nbs-7 return on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a certificate from its statutory auditor every year to the effect that it is engaged in the business of non-banking financial institution requi
controls.control_description:
Statutory Auditors Certificate (SAC):

Every NBFC shall submit a Certificate from its Statutory Auditor every year to the effect that it is engaged in the business of non-banking financial institution requiring it to hold a Certificate of Registration granted under section 45-IA of the RBI Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a certificate from its statutory auditor every year to the effect that it is engaged in the business of non-banking financial institution requi

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit a certificate from their statutory auditor on a half-yearly basis certifying compliance with the existing terms and conditions of fdi, to th
controls.control_description:
Certificate on compliance with FDI norms:

The NBFCs having Foreign Direct Investment are required to submit a Certificate from their Statutory Auditor on a half-yearly basis certifying compliance with the existing terms and conditions of FDI, to the Regional Office in whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit a certificate from their statutory auditor on a half-yearly basis certifying compliance with the existing terms and conditions of fdi, to th

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit the overseas investment return on a quarterly basis to the regional office in whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is loc
controls.control_description:
Overseas Investment Return:
The NBFCs (both deposit taking and non-deposit taking) having overseas investment are required to submit the Overseas Investment Return on a quarterly basis to the Regional Office in whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is located, and also to the Department of Statistics and Information Management (DSIM), Central Office, Mumbai.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit the overseas investment return on a quarterly basis to the regional office in whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is loc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the nbfcs to the concerned regional office of the bank, certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under
controls.control_description: In addition to the above, an annual certificate from statutory auditors shall be submitted by the NBFCs to the concerned Regional Office of the Bank, certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under Master Direction - Non Banking Financial Company - Systemically Important Non Deposit taking and Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Direction 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the nbfcs to the concerned regional office of the bank, certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under

controls.control_objective: To ensure to report the crilc return on a quarterly basis online through xbrl application (https://125
controls.control_description:
CRILC & SMA-2 Return (on early Recognition of Stress on large accounts)

All NBFCs-ND-SI, NBFCs-D and NBFC-Factors are required to report the CRILC return on a quarterly basis online through XBRL application (https://125.18.33.234/orfsxbrl/customer/index.jsp).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to report the crilc return on a quarterly basis online through xbrl application (https://125

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that there is no need to submit 'nil' returns
controls.control_description: It may be noted that there is no need to submit 'Nil' returns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be noted that there is no need to submit 'nil' returns

controls.control_objective: To ensure to report all the sma-2 accounts (as defined in the master direction - non banking financial company - systemically important non deposit taking and d
controls.control_description:
Further, the concerned NBFCs are required to report all the SMA-2 accounts (as defined in the Master Direction - Non Banking Financial Company - Systemically
Important Non Deposit taking and Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Direction, 2016) on the Friday of the week when the relevant account first came in SMA-2 category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to report all the sma-2 accounts (as defined in the master direction - non banking financial company - systemically important non deposit taking and d

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit the half yearly statement, in the format given in annex-3, to the regional office of the department of non-banking supervision in whose juri
controls.control_description:
Statement on Interest Rate Futures transaction

NBFCs participating in IRF exchanges for hedging their underlying exposures are required to submit the half yearly statement, in the format given in Annex-3, to the Regional office of the Department of Non-Banking Supervision in whose jurisdiction their company is registered, within a period of one month from the close of the half year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit the half yearly statement, in the format given in annex-3, to the regional office of the department of non-banking supervision in whose juri

controls.control_objective: To ensure to file the specified returns online through cosmos application
controls.control_description: Concerned NBFCs are required to file the specified returns online through COSMOS application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to file the specified returns online through cosmos application

controls.control_objective: To ensure deliver to the reserve bank an audited balance sheet as on the last date of each financial year and an audited profit and loss account in respect of t
controls.control_description:
Every miscellaneous non-banking company shall deliver to the Reserve Bank an
audited balance sheet as on the last date of each financial year and an audited profit
and loss account in respect of that year as passed by the company in general
meeting together with a copy of the report of the Board of Directors laid before the
company in such meeting in terms of section 217(1) of the Companies Act, 1956 (1
of 1956) within fifteen days of such meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deliver to the reserve bank an audited balance sheet as on the last date of each financial year and an audited profit and loss account in respect of t

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the reserve bank an annual return furnishing the information specified in the format given
controls.control_description:
Without prejudice to the provisions of above paragraph, every miscellaneous non-
banking company [holding or accepting deposits] shall submit to the Reserve Bank
an annual return furnishing the information specified in the format given.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the reserve bank an annual return furnishing the information specified in the format given

controls.control_description:
(i) Every miscellaneous non-banking company shall, not later than one month
from the coming into force of these directions or from the commencement of
business, whichever is later, deliver to the Reserve Bank, a written statement
containing a list of:-
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , not later than one month from the coming into force of these directions or from the commencement of business, whichever is later, deliver to the res

controls.control_objective: To ensure be intimated to the reserve bank within one month from the occurrence of such change
controls.control_description:
(ii) any change in the list referred to in clause (i) of this sub-paragraph shall be
intimated to the Reserve Bank within one month from the occurrence of such
change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be intimated to the reserve bank within one month from the occurrence of such change

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted or furnished to the regional office of the [department of non banking supervision] of the reserve bank within whose jurisdiction the regi
controls.control_description:
Any balance sheet, returns or information required to be submitted or furnished to
the Reserve Bank in pursuance of these directions shall be submitted or furnished to
the Regional Office of the [Department of Non Banking Supervision] of the Reserve
Bank within whose jurisdiction the registered office of the company is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted or furnished to the regional office of the [department of non banking supervision] of the reserve bank within whose jurisdiction the regi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding on all the parties concerned
controls.control_description:
Chapter V Interpretation
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of the Directions, the Bank may, if it
considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered
herein and the interpretation of any provision of the Directions given by the Bank
shall be final and binding on all the parties concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding on all the parties concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure invite penal action under the provisions of rbi act
controls.control_description:
Violation of these Directions
shall invite penal action under the provisions of RBI Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invite penal action under the provisions of rbi act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Further, these provisions
shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws,
rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as given under the directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals / acknowledgements given under the above circulars shall be
deemed as given under the directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as given under the directions
